case_title: IAN GARDNER et al VS. FREDERICK BENJAMIN FRANKS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2010 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY FREDERICK BENJAMIN FRANKS IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $475.00 OR MORE ON THE FIFTEENTH OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKS, FREDERICK BENJAMIN TROTT, ANNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY ALL PARTIES. SERVICE WAIVED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT FRANKS, FREDERICK BENJAMIN HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-04-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR, CREDITOR'S RESPONSE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GARDNER, IAN GARDNER, ELMA AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKS, FREDERICK BENJAMIN TROTT, ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARDNER, IAN GARDNER, ELMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKS, FREDERICK BENJAMIN TROTT, ANNE $3,998.67 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,073.67, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES A CREDIT FOR DEFENDANTS' SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
